name: Nerdy Raven
description:
The Ultimate form of her!!!

During a investigation at a Tokyo comic convention, Raven was splashed by a corrupted relic of Brushogun. An entity that creates living ink. Instead of harming her, the ink fused with her body, reshaping her based on her hidden passions and hobbies.

Art by: Inks-Kinks (DeviantArt}
creator: Victor Hellrazor
